title: Spanish A1–A2 taxonomy backbone
note: Lightweight CEFR level + grammar-topic reference used to tag generated/imported Spanish content. Proof-of-concept slice: A1 plus the start of A2.

levels.title: Foundations
levels.descriptor: Understands and uses familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases.

levels.title: Everyday Fluency
levels.descriptor: Communicates in simple routine tasks on familiar matters.

levels.title: Independent User
levels.descriptor: Deals with most situations while travelling; describes experiences, opinions, plans.

levels.title: Upper-Intermediate
levels.descriptor: Interacts with fluency and spontaneity; produces clear, detailed text on many subjects.

grammarTopics.title: ser & estar
grammarTopics.description: The two verbs 'to be': permanent traits (ser) vs states/location (estar).

grammarTopics.title: Subject pronouns
grammarTopics.description: yo, tú, él/ella/usted, nosotros, vosotros, ellos/ustedes.

grammarTopics.title: Present tense (regular -ar/-er/-ir)
grammarTopics.description: Regular present-tense conjugation of the three verb groups.

grammarTopics.title: Articles & noun gender
grammarTopics.description: Definite el/la/los/las and indefinite un/una/unos/unas; noun gender.

grammarTopics.title: Questions & question words
grammarTopics.description: qué, quién, dónde, cómo, cuándo, por qué; yes/no questions and intonation.

grammarTopics.title: Common irregular verbs
grammarTopics.description: High-frequency irregulars: tener, ir, hacer, poder, querer.

grammarTopics.title: Negation (no / nunca / nada)
grammarTopics.description: Basic negation with no and common negative words.

grammarTopics.title: Possessive adjectives
grammarTopics.description: mi, tu, su, nuestro, vuestro; agreement in number.

grammarTopics.title: Adjective agreement
grammarTopics.description: Adjectives agree in gender and number with the noun.

grammarTopics.title: Gustar & likes
grammarTopics.description: me/te/le gusta(n) to express likes and preferences.

grammarTopics.title: ir a + infinitive (near future)
grammarTopics.description: Talking about plans with the periphrastic future.

grammarTopics.title: Basic prepositions
grammarTopics.description: en, de, a, con, por; a + el = al, de + el = del.

grammarTopics.title: hay (there is / there are)
grammarTopics.description: Impersonal 'hay' to state existence and quantities.

grammarTopics.title: Pretérito indefinido
grammarTopics.description: Simple past for completed actions; regular and key irregular forms.

grammarTopics.title: Pretérito imperfecto
grammarTopics.description: Past habits, descriptions and background; regular and irregular forms.

grammarTopics.title: Reflexive verbs
grammarTopics.description: Reflexive pronouns (me, te, se…) and daily-routine verbs.

grammarTopics.title: por vs para
grammarTopics.description: Contrasting uses of por and para.
